CreateTemplateV2.name: Template name, must be unique
CreateTemplateV2.linear: Whether tasks execute serially, default false
CreateTemplateV2.parallelism: Concurrency level; controls the number of operators that can run concurrently when linear=false
CreateTemplateV2.operators.name: Custom task name, must be unique within the same template (required)
CreateTemplateV2.operators.operator: Task ID/type identifier (e.g. BCE::BCC::StopInstance); cannot both be empty with template.ref
CreateTemplateV2.operators.label: Task display name
CreateTemplateV2.operators.template: The template used by the operator
CreateTemplateV2.operators.retryInterval: Retry interval in milliseconds, default 300000 (5 minutes)
CreateTemplateV2.operators.timeout: Timeout duration in milliseconds, default 21600000 (6 hours); timeout triggers a retry
CreateTemplateV2.operators.parallelismRatio: Allowed parallelism ratio, range [0,1], default 0; takes effect only when the loops field is present
CreateTemplateV2.operators.parallelismCount: Allowed parallelism count, default 0; mutually exclusive with parallelismRatio
CreateTemplateV2.operators.parallelismControl: Parallelism control config (ratio/count), equivalent object form of parallelismRatio/parallelismCount
CreateTemplateV2.operators.allowedFailureRatio: Allowed loop failure ratio, range [0,1], default 0
CreateTemplateV2.operators.allowedFailureControl: Allowed failure control config (ratio/count), equivalent object form of allowedFailureRatio/allowedFailureCount
CreateTemplateV2.operators.manually: Whether manual execution is required, default false
CreateTemplateV2.operators.waitOnAgentMilli: Milliseconds to wait for agent to come online
CreateTemplateV2.operators.pauseOnFailure: Whether to pause on failure, default false
CreateTemplateV2.operators.condition: Condition expression determining whether the node should execute (structure depends on the specific expression)
CreateTemplateV2.operators.properties: Parameter values required for task execution
CreateTemplateV2.operators.loops: Loop execution parameter list; cannot be set together with targetInstances
CreateTemplateV2.links: Describes the topology between operators; required when linear=false
CreateTemplateV2.properties.name: Parameter name
CreateTemplateV2.properties.label: Parameter display name
CreateTemplateV2.properties.multiple: Whether multiple selections are allowed in the option list
CreateTemplateV2.properties.selectOptions: New version option list, currently used by system operators only
